title: Risk on tone across markets pushed commodities higher
section_path: Risk on tone across markets pushed commodities higher
section_path_text: Risk on tone across markets pushed commodities higher
summary:
Main
Sentiment was bolstered by a broader risk-on tone across markets. Further supply side issues across energy and metals also provided some support.. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-06-28 094122.png | assets/2024-06-28_risk-on-tone-across-markets-pushed-commodities-higher_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_1bb6d08e4350.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil edged higher despite weak near-term fundamentals.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Sentiment was bolstered by a broader risk-on tone across markets. Further supply side issues across energy and metals also provided some support..

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil edged higher despite weak near-term fundamentals. The unexpected rise in US inventories last week raised alarm bells, with the market expecting a drawdown as the US summer driving season begins.
